name: CLAWBSTER
description: Clawbster is an autonomous AI-powered trading system deployed on the Base network. It is designed to analyze on-chain activity, market data, and sentiment signals from multiple sources to identify potential trading opportunities in real time. Using an intelligent decision engine, Clawbster evaluates risk and probability before executing trades automatically based on predefined logic and data-driven strategies. The system operates continuously, aiming to optimize execution speed and consistency without emotional bias. Clawbster is built with a self-custodial architecture, meaning users retain full control of their funds at all times while the protocol performs automated trade execution on their behalf. The platform focuses on transparency, automation, and efficiency within decentralized trading environments.
